allow: Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('isCorrect:', r.aiFeedback?.isCorrect\); console.log\('quality:', r.aiFeedback?.explanationQuality\); console.log\('hasPrereq:', !!r.aiFeedback?.prerequisitePath\); console.log\('perfId:', r.performance?.id?.slice\(0,8\)\)}\)")

Bash(node -e "let d=''; process.stdin.on\('data',c=>d+=c\); process.stdin.on\('end',\(\)=>{const r=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('isCorrect:', r.aiFeedback?.isCorrect\); console.log\('quality:', r.aiFeedback?.explanationQuality\); console.log\('explanation preview:', r.aiFeedback?.aiExplanation?.slice\(0,100\)\); console.log\('hasPrereq:', !!r.aiFeedback?.prerequisitePath\); console.log\('perfId:', r.performance?.id?.slice\(0,8\)\)}\)")
